title: Vector Element-wise Sum

pytorch_test_cases.test:
import torch
result = vector_sum(torch.tensor([1, 2, 3]), torch.tensor([4, 5, 6]))
print(result.numpy().tolist())

import torch
result = vector_sum(torch.tensor([1, 2]), torch.tensor([1, 2, 3]))
print(result)

import torch
result = vector_sum(torch.tensor([1.5, 2.5, 3.0]), torch.tensor([2, 1, 4]))
print(result.numpy().tolist())

tinygrad_test_cases.test:
from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
result = vector_sum(Tensor([1, 2, 3]), Tensor([4, 5, 6]))
print(result.numpy().tolist())

from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
result = vector_sum(Tensor([1, 2]), Tensor([1, 2, 3]))
print(result)

from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
result = vector_sum(Tensor([1.5, 2.5, 3.0]), Tensor([2.0, 1.0, 4.0]))
print(result.numpy().tolist())
